law.text:
SECTION II. - INTENTIONAL KILLING, NOT REFERRED TO AS MANSLAUGHTER, AND INTENTIONAL INFLICTING OF BODILY INJURY.

Art. 398. Whoever intentionally causes wounds or blows shall be punished with imprisonment from eight days to six months and a fine of twenty-six [euro] to one hundred [euro] or with one of these penalties alone.
In case the offender acted with premeditation, he shall be sentenced to imprisonment from one month to one year and to a fine of fifty [euro] to two hundred [euro].

Art. 399. If the blows or wounds result in illness or incapacity to perform personal labor, the offender shall be punished with imprisonment from two months to two years and with a fine of fifty [euro] to two hundred [euro].
The offender shall be punished with imprisonment from six months to three years and with a fine of one hundred [euro] to five hundred [euro], if he acted with premeditation.

Art. 400. The penalty is imprisonment from two years to five years and a fine of two hundred [euro] to five hundred [euro], if the blows or wounds result in an incurable-looking disease, incapacity to perform personal labor for more than four months, complete loss of use of an organ, or a severe disfigurement.
The penalty is imprisonment from five years to ten years, in case the offender acted with premeditation.

Art. 401. When blows or wounds are intentionally inflicted, but without the intent to kill, and nevertheless cause death, the offender shall be punished with imprisonment from five years to ten years.
He shall be punished with imprisonment from ten years to fifteen years if he commits those acts of violence with premeditation.

kb_used.fo:
vocabulary V {
  type Offender
  IntentionalInjuryOrBlows: Offender -> Bool
  Premeditation: Offender -> Bool
  ResultedInSicknessOrUnfitness: Offender -> Bool
  ResultedInApparentlyIncurableDiseaseOrSevereConsequence: Offender -> Bool
  ResultedInDeathWithoutIntentToKill: Offender -> Bool

  imprisonmentMinDays: Offender -> Int
  imprisonmentMaxDays: Offender -> Int
  fineMinEuro: Offender -> Int
  fineMaxEuro: Offender -> Int
  punishedArt398: Offender -> Bool
  punishedArt399: Offender -> Bool
  punishedArt400: Offender -> Bool
  punishedArt401: Offender -> Bool
}

theory T:V {
  ! o in Offender:
    punishedArt398(o) <=> IntentionalInjuryOrBlows(o) & ~ResultedInSicknessOrUnfitness(o) & ~ResultedInApparentlyIncurableDiseaseOrSevereConsequence(o) & ~ResultedInDeathWithoutIntentToKill(o).

  ! o in Offender:
    imprisonmentMinDays(o) = 8 <=> punishedArt398(o) & ~Premeditation(o).
  ! o in Offender:
    imprisonmentMaxDays(o) = 180 <=> punishedArt398(o) & ~Premeditation(o).
  ! o in Offender:
    fineMinEuro(o) = 26 <=> punishedArt398(o) & ~Premeditation(o).
  ! o in Offender:
    fineMaxEuro(o) = 100 <=> punishedArt398(o) & ~Premeditation(o).

  ! o in Offender:
    imprisonmentMinDays(o) = 30 <=> punishedArt398(o) & Premeditation(o).
  ! o in Offender:
    imprisonmentMaxDays(o) = 365 <=> punishedArt398(o) & Premeditation(o).
  ! o in Offender:
    fineMinEuro(o) = 50 <=> punishedArt398(o) & Premeditation(o).
  ! o in Offender:
    fineMaxEuro(o) = 200 <=> punishedArt398(o) & Premeditation(o).

  ! o in Offender:
    punishedArt399(o) <=> ResultedInSicknessOrUnfitness(o) & ~ResultedInApparentlyIncurableDiseaseOrSevereConsequence(o) & ~ResultedInDeathWithoutIntentToKill(o) & IntentionalInjuryOrBlows(o).

  ! o in Offender:
    imprisonmentMinDays(o) = 60 <=> punishedArt399(o) & ~Premeditation(o).
  ! o in Offender:
    imprisonmentMaxDays(o) = 730 <=> punishedArt399(o) & ~Premeditation(o).
  ! o in Offender:
    fineMinEuro(o) = 50 <=> punishedArt399(o) & ~Premeditation(o).
  ! o in Offender:
    fineMaxEuro(o) = 200 <=> punishedArt399(o) & ~Premeditation(o).

  ! o in Offender:
    imprisonmentMinDays(o) = 180 <=> punishedArt399(o) & Premeditation(o).
  ! o in Offender:
    imprisonmentMaxDays(o) = 1095 <=> punishedArt399(o) & Premeditation(o).
  ! o in Offender:
    fineMinEuro(o) = 100 <=> punishedArt399(o) & Premeditation(o).
  ! o in Offender:
    fineMaxEuro(o) = 500 <=> punishedArt399(o) & Premeditation(o).

  ! o in Offender:
    punishedArt400(o) <=> ResultedInApparentlyIncurableDiseaseOrSevereConsequence(o) & IntentionalInjuryOrBlows(o) & ~ResultedInDeathWithoutIntentToKill(o).

  ! o in Offender:
    imprisonmentMinDays(o) = 730 <=> punishedArt400(o) & ~Premeditation(o).
  ! o in Offender:
    imprisonmentMaxDays(o) = 1825 <=> punishedArt400(o) & ~Premeditation(o).
  ! o in Offender:
    fineMinEuro(o) = 200 <=> punishedArt400(o) & ~Premeditation(o).
  ! o in Offender:
    fineMaxEuro(o) = 500 <=> punishedArt400(o) & ~Premeditation(o).

  ! o in Offender:
    imprisonmentMinDays(o) = 1825 <=> punishedArt400(o) & Premeditation(o).
  ! o in Offender:
    imprisonmentMaxDays(o) = 3650 <=> punishedArt400(o) & Premeditation(o).

  ! o in Offender:
    punishedArt401(o) <=> ResultedInDeathWithoutIntentToKill(o) & IntentionalInjuryOrBlows(o).

  ! o in Offender:
    imprisonmentMinDays(o) = 1825 <=> punishedArt401(o) & ~Premeditation(o).
  ! o in Offender:
    imprisonmentMaxDays(o) = 3650 <=> punishedArt401(o) & ~Premeditation(o).

  ! o in Offender:
    imprisonmentMinDays(o) = 3650 <=> punishedArt401(o) & Premeditation(o).
  ! o in Offender:
    imprisonmentMaxDays(o) = 5475 <=> punishedArt401(o) & Premeditation(o).

  ! o in Offender:
    (punishedArt398(o) | punishedArt399(o) | punishedArt400(o) | punishedArt401(o)) => IntentionalInjuryOrBlows(o).
}

case.text: Anna and Bruno are cycling on a bike path. Bruno briefly looks back at his child and accidentally rides into Anna. Anna falls and has a minor bruise. There was no intent: Bruno acted accidentally. Anna is able to function normally again the same day.

pipeline.natural_language: No. Bruno is not punished under Article 398. (If you expected Yes, ensure case facts use the exact predicate names from the KB schema.)
No. Anna is not punished under Article 398. (If you expected Yes, ensure case facts use the exact predicate names from the KB schema.)
